title: lopezia grandiflora subsp. macrophylla
intro: Lopezia grandiflora subsp. macrophylla, also known as the large-flowered lobelia or large-flowered lobe, is a flowering plant species in the family Polemoniaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal and health benefits. Lopezia grandiflora subsp. macrophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin irritations.
